stale_acknowledged.reason: The three *_scores_100 tests in test_scaffold__check_engine.py share the score==100/grade A assertion shape but diverge in setup: each consumes a distinct module-scoped fixture (workspace_project, standalone_project, member_project) built by a different Copier render path — the member fixture additionally scaffolds a workspace, renders a MEMBER inside packages/, and runs patch_all — and asserts a different detect_context (WORKSPACE/STANDALONE/MEMBER). Parametrizing would fuse three heavyweight module-scope fixtures into one and erase the per-context scaffold setup that is the point of the test. ambiguous_setup_divergence — ACK.
